chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2046 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 19.03.2024 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for petitioners. Ms. Gul Naz Firdous, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mumtaz Ali, Council Officer is present, has filed a report on behalf of respondent No.3, and submits that already summary has been moved for promotion of petitioners, which has been approved by Chief Officer, District Council, Sukkur. DPC would be held within one month and case of the petitioners would be considered. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in above terms. After one month the report of the DPC shall be submitted before this Court for a perusal, and if within one month, the DPC is not done and the case of the petitioners is not considered, the responsible officer shall also be present along with such report. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
